epic.title: Frontier-Level Portfolio Polish
epic.description: Transform dicoangelo.com into an undeniably impressive portfolio that communicates AI-Augmented Operator + Systems Thinker positioning. Quality bar: Linear × Stripe × Vercel × Raycast.

quality_gates.universal: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
quality_gates.ui: Verify with dev-browser skill before marking complete

stories.title: Premium Color System
stories.description: As a visitor, I want a sophisticated color palette with dynamic gradients so that the visual identity feels elevated and intentional.
acceptance_criteria: Define CSS custom properties for full palette
Animated gradient backgrounds (subtle movement, not distracting)
Accent color that shifts based on section/context
Gradient text for key headlines (with solid fallback)
Consistent across dark and light modes
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Progressive Loading Strategy
stories.description: As a visitor, I want fast initial load with progressive enhancement so that I see content immediately and features enhance over time.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Scroll-Triggered Animations
stories.description: As a visitor, I want content to reveal elegantly as I scroll so that the experience feels crafted and intentional.
acceptance_criteria: Parallax effects on key visual elements (subtle, not nauseating)
Animations only trigger once (not on every scroll pass)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Cinematic Dark/Light Toggle
stories.description: As a visitor, I want a beautiful theme transition so that even utility actions feel premium.
acceptance_criteria: Toggle with cinematic transition (not instant swap)
Options: radial wipe from toggle, full-screen fade, or clip-path reveal
Respects system preference on first visit
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Adaptive Navigation
stories.description: As a visitor, I want navigation that adapts to my scroll behavior so that it's always accessible but never intrusive.
acceptance_criteria: Initially visible, hides on scroll down
Reappears on scroll up or hover at top
Becomes translucent/blur backdrop when over content
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Ambient Particle System
stories.description: As a visitor, I want subtle, intelligent particle animations in the background so that the site feels alive and premium without being distracting.
acceptance_criteria: Particles respond to scroll position (density/speed changes)
Particles subtly attract toward cursor on hover
Use canvas or WebGL (not DOM elements)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: 3D Hero Element
stories.description: As a visitor, I want an interactive 3D element in the hero section so that I immediately understand this person operates at a different level.
acceptance_criteria: 3D geometric form (abstract, not literal) using Three.js/React Three Fiber
Morphs on scroll (transforms as user scrolls down)
Mobile: static or simplified animation (touch to interact)
Abstract crystalline/network structure representing systems thinking
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Kinetic Typography
stories.description: As a visitor, I want headline text that animates with purpose so that the messaging lands with impact.
acceptance_criteria: Hero headline reveals with staggered character/word animation
Scroll-triggered text animations for section headers
At least one signature text effect (split, blur-in, or magnetic)
Text remains accessible (not hidden until animation)
Works with variable fonts for weight transitions
Use Framer Motion or GSAP for orchestration
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Intelligent Cursor
stories.description: As a visitor, I want the cursor to respond intelligently to page elements so that interactions feel premium and intentional.
acceptance_criteria: Custom cursor that follows mouse with slight delay (lerp)
Cursor morphs on interactive elements (grows, changes shape)
Magnetic effect on buttons (cursor + button attract)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Micro-interactions
stories.description: As a visitor, I want subtle feedback on every interaction so that the site feels responsive and alive.
acceptance_criteria: Form input focus states with animation
Sound effects option (off by default, toggle in settings)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Command Palette
stories.description: As a power user, I want a command palette for quick navigation so that I can explore the site efficiently and be impressed by the attention to detail.
acceptance_criteria: Quick actions: toggle theme, contact, view resume, external links
Commands: Navigation (Home, About, Projects, Contact), Actions (Toggle Dark Mode, Download Resume, Copy Email), External (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter), Easter eggs (terminal, matrix, hire me)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Terminal Easter Egg
stories.description: As a curious visitor, I want to discover a hidden terminal mode so that I'm delighted and see the technical depth.
acceptance_criteria: Activated via command palette (terminal) or keyboard sequence
Type commands to navigate: cd projects, cat about.txt, ls skills
Fun responses to commands like sudo hire-me, whoami, help
Exit with exit or Escape key
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Section Side Navigation
stories.description: As a visitor, I want a side indicator showing my position so that I can quickly jump between sections.
acceptance_criteria: Click to jump to section (smooth scroll)
Tooltip on hover showing section name
Fades out on mobile or becomes swipe indicator
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Testimonial System
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to see credible testimonials so that I trust this person's capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Photos with subtle parallax or hover effect
Quote with highlight animation on key phrases
Link to LinkedIn profile where possible
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Logo Wall
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to see companies/projects associated so that I understand the caliber of work.
acceptance_criteria: Grid of logos (grayscale default, color on hover)
Click to filter projects by that company
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Animated Metrics
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to see impressive numbers so that achievements feel tangible.
acceptance_criteria: Count-up animation when scrolled into view
Key metrics: projects, years, technologies, impact numbers
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Case Study Presentation
stories.description: As a visitor, I want deep-dive case studies so that I understand the depth of work.
acceptance_criteria: Each case study as a mini-journey (scroll-driven)
View Live and View Code CTAs where applicable
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: AI-Augmentation Narrative
stories.description: As a visitor, I want to understand the AI-augmented approach so that I see this as a differentiator, not a limitation.
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated section or woven into About
Framing: Orchestration mastery not AI does my work
Visual showing human judgment + AI capability
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Visitor Context Detection
stories.description: As the site owner, I want to understand visitor context so that I can tailor the experience.
acceptance_criteria: Detect: time of day, referrer, device, return visitor
Adjust greeting based on time (Good evening)
Highlight relevant content based on referrer (GitHub → projects)
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Return Visitor Experience
stories.description: As a return visitor, I want the site to remember me so that I feel recognized.
acceptance_criteria: Show New since your last visit for updated content
Skip intro animations on repeat visits
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Dynamic Content Adaptation
stories.description: As a visitor, I want content that adapts to my interests so that I see the most relevant information.
acceptance_criteria: Surface related content based on behavior
Smart project ordering based on interest signals
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Touch-Optimized Interactions
stories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want interactions designed for touch so that the experience feels native, not adapted.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes
Verify with dev-browser skill on mobile viewport

stories.title: App-Like Transitions
stories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want smooth page transitions so that the site feels like a native app.
acceptance_criteria: Slide/fade transitions based on navigation direction
Bottom navigation option for key sections
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes
Verify with dev-browser skill on mobile viewport

stories.title: Offline Capability (PWA)
stories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want basic offline access so that I can view content without connection.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Mobile Gesture Navigation
stories.description: As a mobile visitor, I want intuitive gesture controls so that navigation feels native.
acceptance_criteria: Pull-to-refresh style interaction for easter eggs
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes
Verify with dev-browser skill on mobile viewport

stories.title: Core Web Vitals Excellence
stories.description: As the site owner, I want perfect CWV scores so that the site ranks well and feels fast.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Graceful Degradation
stories.description: As a visitor on a low-end device, I want a functional experience so that I can still access content.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes

stories.title: Final Polish Pass
stories.description: As the site owner, I want obsessive attention to detail so that nothing feels unfinished.
acceptance_criteria: All focus states visible and styled
No layout shift on any interaction
OG images generated for all pages
npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test passes
